text: The surgeon places five ports before docking the robot, using one of the available eight-millimeter ports to pass sutures and mesh.
The surgeon prepares to use a 10 by 15 centimeter ProGrip mesh, likely positioning it within the surgical field.
The surgeon closes the peritoneal lining using an absorbable 2-0 V-Loc suture, followed by closing a small defect in the peritoneum with a 3-0 Vicryl suture on an S-H needle.
